prompt: I am building a Python-only operations assistant with a local SLM. Design an architecture that stores domain knowledge, planning strategies, and capability metadata so the model can reason and plan reliably.
assertions: Includes storage design covering knowledge, strategies, capabilities
Includes local-vs-cloud decision with explicit criteria
Clearly separates priority policy vs planning strategy
Python-only implementation guidance with concrete tools
Includes phased roadmap with measurable KPIs
